mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_workplace_site WHERE active = 1 ORDER BY building_number
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_workplace_site ( building_number, site_name, site_code, site_type, industry, address, business_reg_no, she_manager, established_date, representative_contact, risk_grade, operation_status, notes, active, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{buildingNumber}, #{siteName}, #{siteCode}, #{siteType}, #{industry}, #{address}, #{businessRegNo}, #{sheManager}, #{establishedDate}, #{representativeContact}, #{riskGrade}, #{operationStatus}, #{notes}, 1, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_workplace_site SET site_name = #{siteName}, site_code = #{siteCode}, site_type = #{siteType}, industry = #{industry}, address = #{address}, business_reg_no = #{businessRegNo}, she_manager = #{sheManager}, established_date = #{establishedDate}, representative_contact = #{representativeContact}, risk_grade = #{riskGrade}, operation_status = #{operationStatus}, notes = #{notes}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_workplace_site SET active = 0, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
